knowledge.html:
X. RELATIVE CLAUSES (MỆNH ĐỀ QUAN HỆ)

1. Cách sử dụng các đại từ quan hệ trong MDQH

S (chủ ngữ)O (tân ngữ)P (sở hữu)
Danh từ chỉ ngườiWho/thatWho/whom/thatWhose
Danh từ chỉ vậtWhich/thatWhich/thatWhose
Dt vừa người & vậtThatThat
Nơi chốnWhere = in/at/on which
Thời gianWhen = in/at/on which
Lý doWhy = for which

2. Các loại mệnh đề quan hệ

a. Mệnh đề quan hệ có giới hạn (không dấu phẩy)

- Thường dùng khi danh từ dùng trước DTQH có mạo từ "a/an/the".
- Bỏ "who, whom, which, that" khi nó làm túc từ.

Ex: The book is interesting. I bought it yesterday.
=> The book (which) I bought yesterday is interesting.

b. MDQH không giới hạn (có dấu phẩy)

- MDQH không giới hạn xuất hiện khi danh từ dùng trước đại từ quan hệ là:

  • Danh từ riêng
  • Danh từ có tính từ chỉ định (this/that/these/those)
  • Danh từ có tính từ sở hữu (my/his/her/your/their/our/its)
  • Sở hữu cách (Tom's,...)
Ex: Tom, whom you met last night, is my son.
Ex: That man, who has sent you a gift, lives next door to me.
Ex: His book, which was bought last night, is interesting.
Ex: Lan's book, which was bought last night, is interesting.

- Không dùng "THAT" trong MDQH không giới hạn.
- Không được bỏ các đại từ quan hệ làm tân ngữ (WHO, WHOM, WHICH) và các trạng từ quan hệ trong MDQH không giới hạn.
- Trong MDQH không giới hạn, "WHICH" có thể dùng để bổ nghĩa cho cả câu.

Ex: Peter failed again, which does not make us surprised.

- Khi muốn thêm thông tin về toàn bộ hoặc 1 phần số vật hay người cụ thể, ta dùng MDQH không giới hạn với: of which, of whom, of whose, most of, half of, plenty of, some of, one of, neither of, all of, several of, both of, ten of, a few of...

Ex: I received two jobs offers, neither of which I accepted.
Ex: I have two friends, one of whose problems is poor study habit.

3. Giới từ với đại từ quan hệ

Trong mệnh đề quan hệ có giới từ thì giới từ có 2 vị trí dùng:

  • Giới từ dùng trước đại từ quan hệ hoặc giới từ dùng sau động từ.
  • Lưu ý: Giới từ không dùng trước đại từ quan hệ "who và that".
  • Khi giới từ là thành phần của cụm động từ thì không thể đem ra trước "whom, which, whose".
  • Giới từ "WITHOUT" không được đặt sau động từ mà phải đặt trước đại từ quan hệ.
Ex: She is the woman about whom I told you.
She is the woman who/whom/that I told you about.
Ex: The woman without whom I can't live is Jane.

4. Mệnh đề quan hệ rút gọn

DạngKhi nàoVí dụ
V-ingĐộng từ trong MDQH ở thể chủ độngThat man, standing over there, is my best friend.
V3/edĐộng từ trong MDQH ở thể bị độngThe boy injured in the accident was taken to the hospital.
To VChủ ngữ dùng sau the first, the last, the next, the only, the one, so sánh nhấtHe was the last man to leave the burning building.

exercises.question: Genghis Khan, _______ name means "very mighty ruler", was a Mongol emperor in the Middle Ages.
exercises.explanation: 'whose' chỉ sở hữu, dùng trước danh từ 'name'. => 'whose name means...'

exercises.question: The house _______ windows are blue was built in the 20th century.
exercises.explanation: 'whose' chỉ sở hữu cho 'house' => 'whose windows'. Lưu ý: 'of which' (D) cũng có thể dùng nhưng cần viết lại: 'the windows of which' hoặc 'of which the windows'. Dạng trong câu này chỉ 'whose' là đúng ngữ pháp.

exercises.question: The paintings _______ are marked with small red dot have already been sold.
exercises.explanation: 'paintings' là vật, cần chủ ngữ => 'which'.

exercises.question: The restaurant _______ Bob recommended was too expensive.
exercises.explanation: 'restaurant' là vật, làm tân ngữ của 'recommended' => 'which'.

exercises.question: Bogota, _______ is the capital city of Columbia, is a cosmopolitan city.
exercises.explanation: MDQH không giới hạn (có dấu phẩy), 'Bogota' là danh từ riêng chỉ vật => 'which'. Không dùng 'that' trong MDQH không giới hạn.

exercises.question: Sally lost her job, _______ wasn't a surprise.
exercises.explanation: 'which' bổ nghĩa cho cả mệnh đề trước (việc Sally mất việc). Không dùng 'that' sau dấu phẩy.

exercises.question: The land and the people _______ I have met are nice.
exercises.explanation: Khi danh từ vừa chỉ người vừa chỉ vật ('the land and the people') => dùng 'that'.

exercises.question: The chemistry book _______ was a little expensive.
exercises.explanation: 'that' làm tân ngữ của 'bought'. Không thêm 'it' sau động từ.

exercises.question: I hardly understood _______ she was saying about her dream.
exercises.explanation: 'what' = 'the thing which', làm tân ngữ của 'was saying'.

exercises.question: The girl _______ I borrowed the dictionary asked me to use it carefully.
exercises.explanation: 'borrow something from someone' => 'from whom I borrowed'.

exercises.question: I wrote to the girl _______ I met at the meeting.
exercises.explanation: 'girl' là người, làm tân ngữ => 'whom'.

exercises.question: The boy to _______ I lend my money is poor.
exercises.explanation: Giới từ 'to' dùng trước đại từ quan hệ => dùng 'whom' (không dùng 'that' sau giới từ).

exercises.question: The student _______ you just met is one of my classmates.
exercises.explanation: 'student' là người, làm tân ngữ của 'met' => 'that' hoặc 'whom' đều dùng.

exercises.question: The woman _______ lives next door to us is a doctor.
exercises.explanation: 'woman' là người, làm chủ ngữ => 'who' hoặc 'that' đều được.

exercises.question: Carol is the best friend _______ I've ever had in my life.
exercises.explanation: 'friend' là người, làm tân ngữ => 'whom' hoặc 'who' đều được.

exercises.question: The pollution _______ they were talking is getting worse.
exercises.explanation: 'talk about something' => 'about which they were talking'.

exercises.question: Wednesday is the day _______ a tour guide leads a tour around the town's historical places.
exercises.explanation: 'Wednesday' là thời gian => dùng 'when' (= on which).

exercises.question: The town _______ the folk festival is taking place is usually a quiet resort.
exercises.explanation: 'town' là nơi chốn => dùng 'where' (= in which).

exercises.question: The reason _______ she was absent from class yesterday was told to the teacher.
exercises.explanation: 'reason' đi với 'why' (= for which).

exercises.question: This is the CD _______ I bought last month.
exercises.explanation: 'CD' là vật, làm tân ngữ => 'which'.

exercises.question: Can you remember the day _______ John was born?
exercises.explanation: 'day' là thời gian => 'when'.

exercises.question: The secretary _______ is sitting at the first desk on the right can give you the information.
exercises.explanation: 'secretary' là người, làm chủ ngữ => 'who'.

exercises.question: Paul O'Grady _______ died a few years ago, was a kind and loving man.
exercises.explanation: Danh từ riêng 'Paul O'Grady' => MDQH không giới hạn (có dấu phẩy), làm chủ ngữ => ', who'.

exercises.question: I hate the music _______ is too loud.
exercises.explanation: 'music' là vật, làm chủ ngữ => 'which'.

exercises.question: This is Tony. _______ daughter lives next to James.
exercises.explanation: 'whose' chỉ sở hữu, dùng trước danh từ 'daughter'.

exercises.question: Can you pass me the pen _______ is next to the dictionary, Joe?
exercises.explanation: 'pen' là vật, làm chủ ngữ => 'that' hoặc 'which' đều được.

exercises.question: Let's go to the shopping center _______ we can buy something nice for mum's birthday.
exercises.explanation: 'shopping center' là nơi chốn => 'where'.

exercises.question: Don't forget to bring back the book _______ you borrowed.
exercises.explanation: 'book' là vật làm tân ngữ => có thể bỏ đại từ quan hệ (zero relative pronoun).

exercises.question: We really enjoyed the meat _______ Sally made yesterday.
exercises.explanation: 'meat' là vật, làm tân ngữ của 'made' => 'which'.

exercises.question: They travelled to Oxford _______ his father studied medicine.
exercises.explanation: 'Oxford' là nơi chốn => 'where'.

exercises.question: The car _______ broke down was bought few days ago.
exercises.answer: which
exercises.explanation: 'car' là vật, làm chủ ngữ => 'which' hoặc 'that'.

exercises.question: The little girl _______ mother is a doctor was accompanied by her teacher.
exercises.answer: whose
exercises.explanation: 'whose' chỉ sở hữu, dùng trước 'mother'.

exercises.question: Mr John, _______ has just bought a new car, had a terrible accident yesterday.
exercises.answer: who
exercises.explanation: Danh từ riêng 'Mr John' => MDQH không giới hạn, chủ ngữ => 'who'.

exercises.question: This is the person _______ I told you about last week.
exercises.answer: who
exercises.explanation: 'person' là người, làm tân ngữ => 'who/whom/that'.

exercises.question: The book _______ I borrowed from Jane is fantastic!
exercises.answer: which
exercises.explanation: 'book' là vật, làm tân ngữ => 'which' hoặc 'that'.

exercises.question: Linda's schoolbag, _______ is on the table was bought at the same shop as mine.
exercises.answer: which
exercises.explanation: Sở hữu cách 'Linda's' => MDQH không giới hạn => 'which'.

exercises.question: This song, _______ author has died, is very popular.
exercises.answer: whose
exercises.explanation: 'whose' chỉ sở hữu, dùng trước 'author'.

exercises.question: The football player _______ scored is the most popular one in my country.
exercises.answer: who
exercises.explanation: 'football player' là người, làm chủ ngữ => 'who/that'.

exercises.question: The singer _______ fans didn't show up was very upset.
exercises.answer: whose
exercises.explanation: 'whose' chỉ sở hữu => 'whose fans'.

exercises.question: The exam _______ I did last week was very difficult.
exercises.answer: which
exercises.explanation: 'exam' là vật, làm tân ngữ => 'which/that'.

exercises.wrongSentence: That is the man who he told me the bad news.
exercises.correctSentence: That is the man who told me the bad news.
exercises.explanation: 'who' đã là chủ ngữ, không cần thêm 'he' nữa.

exercises.wrongSentence: The singer about who I told you yesterday is coming here tomorrow.
exercises.correctSentence: The singer about whom I told you yesterday is coming here tomorrow.
exercises.explanation: Sau giới từ 'about' phải dùng 'whom', không dùng 'who'.

exercises.wrongSentence: That commentator, his name I have forgotten, is very well-known.
exercises.correctSentence: That commentator, whose name I have forgotten, is very well-known.
exercises.explanation: Dùng 'whose' để chỉ sở hữu trong MDQH, không dùng 'his'.

exercises.wrongSentence: The gangsters for who the police are looking robbed the bank yesterday.
exercises.correctSentence: The gangsters for whom the police are looking robbed the bank yesterday.
exercises.explanation: Sau giới từ 'for' phải dùng 'whom'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Surprisingly, the number of people whom enjoy wave surfing is almost double that of last year.
exercises.correctSentence: Surprisingly, the number of people who enjoy wave surfing is almost double that of last year.
exercises.explanation: 'people' làm chủ ngữ của 'enjoy' => dùng 'who', không dùng 'whom'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Do you know the reason when English people travel to the left?
exercises.correctSentence: Do you know the reason why English people travel to the left?
exercises.explanation: 'reason' đi với 'why' (= for which), không dùng 'when'.

exercises.wrongSentence: She is the most beautiful woman whose I have ever met.
exercises.correctSentence: She is the most beautiful woman whom I have ever met.
exercises.explanation: 'woman' làm tân ngữ của 'met' => dùng 'who/whom', không dùng 'whose'.

exercises.wrongSentence: It is complicated because pollution is caused by things when benefit people.
exercises.correctSentence: It is complicated because pollution is caused by things which/that benefit people.
exercises.explanation: 'things' là vật, làm chủ ngữ của 'benefit' => dùng 'which/that'.

exercises.original: I don't like the man. He is going out with my sister.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: I don't like the man who is going out with my sister.
acceptedAnswers: I don't like the man who is going out with my sister.
I don't like the man that is going out with my sister.
exercises.explanation: Nối hai câu bằng 'who' (chỉ người làm chủ ngữ). 'He is going out with my sister' → 'who is going out with my sister'.

exercises.original: Charlie Chaplin became a very rich man. He was from a poor family.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: Charlie Chaplin, who was from a poor family, became a very rich man.
exercises.explanation: Nối bằng MDQH không giới hạn vì 'Charlie Chaplin' là danh từ riêng. 'He was from a poor family' → ', who was from a poor family,'.

exercises.original: That bike was too expensive. He wanted to buy it.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: That bike which/that he wanted to buy was too expensive.
exercises.explanation: Nối hai câu bằng 'which/that' (chỉ vật làm tân ngữ). 'He wanted to buy it' → 'which/that he wanted to buy'. Bỏ 'it' vì đại từ quan hệ đã thay thế.

exercises.original: I have just greeted the girl. She is sitting next to my brother.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: I have just greeted the girl who is sitting next to my brother.
acceptedAnswers: I have just greeted the girl who is sitting next to my brother.
I have just greeted the girl that is sitting next to my brother.
exercises.explanation: Nối hai câu bằng 'who' (chỉ người làm chủ ngữ). 'She is sitting next to my brother' → 'who is sitting next to my brother'.

exercises.original: Is David the student? David gets the best marks in your class.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: Is David the student who gets the best marks in your class?
acceptedAnswers: Is David the student who gets the best marks in your class?
Is David the student that gets the best marks in your class?
exercises.explanation: Nối hai câu bằng 'who' (chỉ người làm chủ ngữ). 'David gets the best marks' → 'who gets the best marks'. 'who' thay cho 'David'.

exercises.original: We met at the restaurant. Sally recommended it to us.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: We met at the restaurant which/that Sally recommended to us.
exercises.explanation: Nối hai câu bằng 'which/that' (chỉ vật làm tân ngữ). 'Sally recommended it to us' → 'which/that Sally recommended to us'. Bỏ 'it'.

exercises.original: The headmaster phoned Mrs Brown. Her daughter didn't come to school yesterday.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: The headmaster phoned Mrs Brown whose daughter didn't come to school yesterday.
exercises.explanation: Nối hai câu bằng 'whose' (chỉ sự sở hữu). 'Her daughter' → 'whose daughter'. 'whose' thay cho 'her'.

exercises.original: Can I borrow the book? You enjoyed reading it last week.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: Can I borrow the book which/that you enjoyed reading last week?
exercises.explanation: Nối hai câu bằng 'which/that' (chỉ vật làm tân ngữ). 'You enjoyed reading it' → 'which/that you enjoyed reading'. Bỏ 'it'.

exercises.original: The first boy has just moved. He knows the truth.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: The first boy who has just moved knows the truth.
acceptedAnswers: The first boy who has just moved knows the truth.
The first boy that has just moved knows the truth.
exercises.explanation: Nối hai câu bằng 'who/that' (chỉ người làm chủ ngữ). Sau so sánh nhất ('the first') có thể dùng 'that' thay 'who'. 'He has just moved' → 'who has just moved'.

exercises.original: I don't remember the man. You said you met him at the canteen last week.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: I don't remember the man whom you said you met at the canteen last week.
acceptedAnswers: I don't remember the man whom you said you met at the canteen last week.
I don't remember the man who you said you met at the canteen last week.
I don't remember the man that you said you met at the canteen last week.
exercises.explanation: Nối hai câu bằng 'whom' (chỉ người làm tân ngữ). 'You said you met him' → 'whom you said you met'. 'whom' thay cho 'him'.

exercises.original: She left here without saying goodbye. This made me sad.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: She left here without saying goodbye, which made me sad.
exercises.explanation: Nối bằng 'which' chỉ cả mệnh đề trước đó. 'This made me sad' → ', which made me sad'. Dùng dấu phẩy vì bổ nghĩa cho cả câu.

exercises.original: The children often go swimming on Sundays. They have much free time then.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: The children often go swimming on Sundays, when they have much free time.
exercises.explanation: Nối bằng 'when' (chỉ thời gian). 'They have much free time then' → ', when they have much free time'. 'when' thay cho 'then'.

exercises.original: They are looking for the man and his dog. They have lost the way in the forest.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: They're looking for the man and his dog that have lost the way in the forest.
exercises.explanation: Nối bằng 'that' vì danh từ gồm cả người và vật ('the man and his dog'). 'They have lost the way' → 'that have lost the way in the forest'.

exercises.original: That tree has lovely flowers. It stands near the gate of my house.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: That tree which/that stands near the gate of my house has lovely flowers.
exercises.explanation: Nối hai câu bằng 'which/that' (chỉ vật làm chủ ngữ). 'It stands near the gate' → 'which/that stands near the gate of my house'.

exercises.original: My wife wants you to come to dinner. You were speaking to my wife.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: My wife, to whom you were speaking, wants you to come to dinner.
exercises.explanation: Nối bằng MDQH không giới hạn vì 'my wife' có tính từ sở hữu. 'speak to my wife' → ', to whom you were speaking,'. Giới từ 'to' đặt trước 'whom'.

exercises.original: Patrick will never forget the day. His son was born then.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: Patrick will never forget the day when his son was born.
exercises.explanation: Nối bằng 'when' (chỉ thời gian). 'His son was born then' → 'when his son was born'. 'when' thay cho 'then'.

exercises.original: Let's take the children to the park. The park has a nice playground.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: Let's take the children to the park which/that has a nice playground.
exercises.explanation: Nối hai câu bằng 'which/that' (chỉ vật làm chủ ngữ). 'The park has a nice playground' → 'which/that has a nice playground'.

exercises.original: Do you remember Jenny? She used to work in my office.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: Do you remember Jenny, who used to work in my office?
exercises.explanation: Nối bằng MDQH không giới hạn vì 'Jenny' là danh từ riêng. 'She used to work in my office' → ', who used to work in my office?'.

exercises.original: You should go to the new shopping centre. There are a lot of fashionable shops there.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.starterText: You should go to the new
exercises.answer: You should go to the new shopping centre where there are a lot of fashionable shops.
exercises.explanation: Nối bằng 'where' (chỉ nơi chốn). 'There are a lot of fashionable shops there' → 'where there are a lot of fashionable shops'. 'where' thay cho 'there'.

exercises.original: Why don't you wear the blue sweater? I gave it to you at Christmas.
exercises.instruction: Join the sentences using a suitable relative pronoun.
exercises.answer: Why don't you wear the blue sweater which/that I gave to you at Christmas?
exercises.explanation: Nối hai câu bằng 'which/that' (chỉ vật làm tân ngữ). 'I gave it to you at Christmas' → 'which/that I gave to you at Christmas'. Bỏ 'it'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Mother's Day is the day when children show their love to their mother on.
exercises.correctSentence: Mother's Day is the day when children show their love to their mother.
exercises.explanation: 'when' đã thay thế cho 'on the day', nên không cần thêm 'on' ở cuối câu.

exercises.wrongSentence: Every student who majors in English are ready to participate in the orchard contest.
exercises.correctSentence: Every student who majors in English is ready to participate in the orchard contest.
exercises.explanation: 'Every student' là chủ ngữ số ít => động từ chia số ít: 'is ready'.
